content:
There is no params key in macros/module.rs mentioned in the documentation of macros::module.
Is it possible to pass parameters to a kernel Rust-module?

We really need to get rid of the rust-for-linux.github.io site. Can we redirect it to the new documentation URL or add a banner about it being outdated or something? People keep finding them instead of the new docs.
I believe the latest patch trying to add support for it is this one. Though another option is to define the module parameter in a C file, like I do here.
p-alik has marked this topic as resolved.
